en_title: Why Microsoft Announced Ninja Theory's New Game Despite Plans to Shut the Studio Down
cn_title: 微软为何公布《塞娜》时已打算关停Ninja Theory？
subtitle: 一场冷血的算计？
opus_summary: 微软公布《塞娜》后，内部备忘录显示利润率仅3%，旋即传出关闭工作室计划。报道称微软宣布新作时已打算关停或剥离Ninja Theory，借以吸引投资。目前三家工作室正与微软谈判求生，Xbox战略或转向少数大作。

paragraphs.en: At Xbox Games Showcase earlier this month Microsoft announced Senua, the next game in Ninja Theory’s Hellblade series. At the time, there was little concern about the game’s release. Indeed, there was little concern, publicly at least, about Ninja Theory itself.
paragraphs.cn: 本月初在Xbox游戏展示会上，微软公布了Ninja Theory《地狱之刃》系列的新作《塞娜》。当时，几乎没什么人担心这款游戏的发售。实际上，至少从公开层面看，对Ninja Theory本身也没什么担忧。

paragraphs.en: But a lot can change in a week, and in the case of Xbox, almost everything did.
paragraphs.cn: 但一周之内可以发生很多变化，而对Xbox来说，几乎一切都变了。

paragraphs.en: It started with new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma’s “reset” memo, which most took as a signal that Microsoft planned big layoffs and studio closures. Microsoft published the memo just days after Xbox Games Showcase — which had gone down well with core Xbox fans — was held. In it Sharma revealed that Microsoft's gaming business has a 3% accountability margin (assumed to mean profit margin), which is down year-on-year. "Excluding Activision Blizzard King, over the past five years, we have spent over $20 billion on ongoing investments in our content, platform, and hardware subsidy, but our annual revenue has declined nearly half a billion during that time. Going forward, this cannot continue," Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: 事情始于新任Xbox CEO Asha Sharma那份「重置」备忘录，大多数人将其解读为微软计划进行大规模裁员和关闭工作室的信号。微软在Xbox游戏展示会（这次展示会在核心Xbox粉丝中反响不错）举行仅仅几天后，就发布了这份备忘录。Sharma在备忘录中透露，微软游戏业务的问责利润率（推测指净利润率）为3%，同比下降。「除去动视暴雪King，过去五年我们在内容、平台和硬件补贴上的持续投资已超过200亿美元(约合人民币1352亿元)，但同期我们的年收入却下降了近5亿美元(约合人民币34亿元)。这种情况不能继续下去了。」Sharma说道。

paragraphs.en: "the studios most exposed are brilliant for prestige and rotten for the spreadsheet." Concern started to grow for the likes of South of Midnight developer Compulsion, Psychonauts studio Double Fine, and yes, Hellblade developer Ninja Theory, neither of which had seen significant commercial success in recent years.
paragraphs.cn: 「那些最受关注的工作室，在声誉上光彩夺目，在财务账面上却糟糕透顶。」人们开始为《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion、《意航员》工作室Double Fine，以及没错，《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory等担忧，这些工作室近年来都未取得重大商业成功。

paragraphs.en: And then this week, reports emerged that Microsoft had started to take action. The Game Business reported that Xbox Game Studios boss Craig Duncan had stepped down. News of various Microsoft studios potentially closing down was not far behind . IGN has asked Microsoft for comment but it is yet to respond.
paragraphs.cn: 而这周，有报道称微软已经开始采取行动。The Game Business报道称，Xbox Game Studios负责人Craig Duncan已离职。随后不久，各种微软工作室可能关闭的消息就传了出来。IGN已向微软请求置评，但尚未收到回复。

paragraphs.en: Amid the reports, fans expressed confusion at how Microsoft could announce Senua from Ninja Theory and then just days later tell the studio’s staff it planned to shut the company down. According to Game File , Microsoft allegedly planned to close or spin off Ninja Theory when it revealed Senua, and it did so thinking that “the promise of a newly announced game would help draw investor interest in the studio.” Game File’s Stephen Totilo suggests Ninja Theory management may not have even been aware of Microsoft’s plan.
paragraphs.cn: 在这些报道中，粉丝们表示困惑：微软怎么能在公布Ninja Theory的《塞娜》后，仅仅几天就告诉工作室员工公司计划关闭这间工作室？据Game File报道，微软据称在公布《塞娜》时，就已计划关闭或剥离Ninja Theory，并认为「一款新公布游戏的承诺将有助于吸引投资者对该工作室的兴趣」。Game File的Stephen Totilo表示，Ninja Theory管理层甚至可能并不知晓微软的计划。

paragraphs.en: Ninja Theory, Double Fine, and Compulsion are all said to be in negotiations with Microsoft over a potential buyout in a bid to avoid closure. Investment would be needed to help these studios go independent, should Microsoft allow such a thing to happen. But even if the studios were spun off, it’s likely they would suffer significant layoffs in the process. And what would they then work on?
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，Ninja Theory、Double Fine和Compulsion都在与微软谈判，试图通过管理层收购来避免关闭。如果微软允许，这些工作室要独立出去还需要资金投入。但即便这些工作室被剥离出去，在此过程中也极有可能出现大规模裁员。而独立之后，它们又该做什么游戏呢？

paragraphs.en: Will Senua ever come out? IGN has asked Microsoft for comment. Could Ninja Theory bring the Hellblade franchise with it if it does manage to go independent? That’s not something we’ve seen Microsoft do before. When Microsoft closed UK studio Lionhead down, a number of potential investors were interested in taking the studio on, but deals failed because Microsoft would not part ways with the Fable IP. Would Microsoft hand over the keys to Psychonauts to Double Fine, should it go alone? Would it give Compulsion the We Happy Few IP?
paragraphs.cn: 《塞娜》究竟还会不会发售？IGN已向微软询问对方看法。假如Ninja Theory真的成功独立，它能带走《地狱之刃》这个系列吗？微软过去从未允许过类似的事。当初微软关闭英国工作室Lionhead时，有好几家潜在投资方都有意接手，但交易都谈崩了，因为微软不愿放手《神鬼寓言》IP。Double Fine要是独立，微软会把《意航员》的钥匙交给它吗？Compulsion能带走《少数幸运儿》的IP吗？

paragraphs.en: Microsoft under Asha Sharma seems more interested in a handful of blockbuster franchises than smaller scale games. Microsoft is reportedly speeding up development on new The Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games as it considered restructuring or even spinning off its gaming branch.
paragraphs.cn: 在Asha Sharma领导下的微软，似乎更看重少数几款超级大作，而不是中小规模游戏。据报道，微软正在加快《上古卷轴》《辐射》和《光环》新作的开发速度，同时也在考虑重组甚至剥离其游戏部门。

paragraphs.en: The future is uncertain for Microsoft's gaming business and the people who work for it, as it is for pretty much the entire video game industry. Microsoft's financial year comes to an end on June 30, when we're expecting the Xbox layoffs to be accounted for. Clearly, the Xbox that Microsoft is working towards for the next financial year and beyond will look very different than the Xbox of the last decade.
paragraphs.cn: 微软游戏业务以及其员工的未来都充满不确定，整个电子游戏行业也基本如此。微软的本财年将在6月30日结束，预计届时会公布Xbox部门的裁员情况。很明显，微软正在为下一个财年及更远的将来打造的Xbox，将与过去十年的Xbox截然不同。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上找到他：@wyp100。也可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系他。
